title: Delete Story owners

Hi Guys, I need some help. 
I have duplicated a bord to another workspace, lets call it Dupeboard . When I made the duplication, a column with story owners are also duplicated. Now I want to make changes in the Dupeboard…

posts.author: SandOly (Sander)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys, I need some help.

I have duplicated a bord to another workspace, lets call it Dupeboard . When I made the duplication, a column with story owners are also duplicated. Now I want to make changes in the Dupeboard. If I remove the column story owners in Dupeboard, does everyone who is a story owner get a message? I really don’t want that.

Thank you for your help!
